news.title: Anthropic-Pentagon battle shows how big tech has reversed course on AI and war
news.snippet: OpenAI too had a blanket ban on military use, but along with Google, Anthropic and xAI, signed an up-to-$200m contract with the DoD last year to integrate its technology into military systems.

tech.title: LLM Fine-tuning: Techniques for Adapting Language Models
tech.snippet: A common question is when to fine-tune versus using prompting or RAG alone. In practice, fine-tuning is attempted only after exhausting prompt-based methods, and often used in tandem with prompting in real-world scenarios.
